name: design-interview
description: design-interview — interview-driven page tailoring that strips AI design tells, with a deterministic verification engine.

plugins.name: design-interview
plugins.description: Take AI-slop source and, through a Socratic design interview, build landing/detail/proposal pages that look human-designed. Concept is locked with the user before any HTML is generated; delivery is gated by a deterministic design-tell audit. Runs the root SKILL.md as the /design-interview skill.
